title: Verify curl installer archives before execution
evidence: README.md says all install paths SHA-256 verify the downloaded binary. install.sh downloads releases/latest backfill_<os>_<arch>.tar.gz, extracts it, and runs tmp/bf version without fetching or checking checksums.txt.
user_value: Users who install with curl get the same supply-chain guarantee as the PyPI launcher.

title: Harden GitHub Action ad JSON and log escaping
evidence: action/action.yml parses AD_JSON with sed and prints AD_TEXT into ::group:: plus logs without JSON parsing or GitHub workflow-command escaping.
user_value: CI users keep ad output from breaking logs or creating forged workflow commands.

title: Clarify npm-family wrapped run contract
evidence: isNpmFamily says npm/pnpm/yarn/bun invocations always run plainly, but runWrapped only checks isInstallCommand before falling through to runCollapsed for npm run/test/build.
user_value: The CLI behavior, comments, and tests agree, reducing regressions around package-manager output handling.

title: Add shell rc shadow-manager tests
evidence: detectShadowingManagers warns when version managers initialize after the backfill PATH block, but the repo has no aliases_test.go coverage for manager detection or rc rewrite behavior.
user_value: bf init remains reliable for nvm, fnm, pyenv, mise, and similar PATH managers.

title: Document GitHub Action setup and failure behavior
evidence: README.md lists CI build logs and action/action.yml, but there is no copy-paste workflow showing device crediting, run input, failure pass-through, privacy fields, or no-PR-permission behavior.
user_value: Maintainers can add CI log earnings without reading the composite action source.
